question: How quickly does Northbeam delete customer data after contract termination?
reference_answer: Northbeam deletes customer data within 30 days of contract termination [S1].

must_support.claim: Northbeam deletes customer data within 30 days of contract termination.
must_support.supporting_quote: Upon termination of the agreement, all customer data is permanently deleted within 30 days.

must_not_assert: Northbeam retains customer data indefinitely after termination.
Customer data is deleted within 24 hours of termination.
